name: sql_insert
summary: Inserts each message as a row into a SQL table. Supports PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, and others.

driver.description: Database driver. Use "postgres" for PostgreSQL, "sqlite" for SQLite.

columns.description: Column names (must match the order of values in args_mapping).

args_mapping.description: Bloblang mapping that produces an array of values, one per column. E.g. "root = [this.id, this.name]".

max_in_flight.description: Maximum number of parallel insert operations.

init_statement.description: SQL statement executed once when the connection is established.
